attacking_style: Not an attacker; primarily operates as leadout train component in sprint finishes. Breakaway appearances appear tactical misuse rather than deliberate strategy.
team_tactics: Bora-hansgrohe deploys him as penultimate leadout man, executing critical positioning phase before final launcher engages. Late-engaging sprint train architecture.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages where time trial power translates to high-speed leadout work. Exposed in breakaways requiring tactical racing instincts.
vulnerability: Lacks ability to contribute meaningfully in breakaway scenarios despite TT engine. Misused when deployed outside structured sprint train role.
key_patterns: Functions as penultimate leadout positioning specialist in sprint train, not final launcher.
Time trial power base utilized for sustained high-speed leadout work in flat finales.
Ineffective when deployed in breakaway scenarios requiring tactical racing beyond pure power.
form_trajectory: positive: Evolution from misused breakaway rider (2020) to defined, effective leadout role (2023)
